main.description: Registers a Standard Reader labeler. This record is the single source of truth for a labeler: its identity, where to reach its label server, how it presents, and its label-value definitions. Indexed off the network like any other record (the owner of the record is the labeler's author); the label server itself only answers com.atproto.label.queryLabels / subscribeLabels.

did.description: DID of the labeler — the `src` on its labels (and whose key signs them).

serviceEndpoint.description: Origin serving this labeler's com.atproto.label.queryLabels / subscribeLabels.
